title: QA Audit: Collaboration Bus Implementation
summary: Comprehensive review of collaboration-bus across 5 code areas: stampede.sh, commander agent docs, SKILL.md prompt generation, test coverage, and user documentation. Found complete implementation in stampede.sh but pervasive documentation gaps and zero test coverage.

stampede_sh.summary: Collaboration-bus block parsing does NOT exist as documented. Collab is implicit, metaswarm-only, no collab=enable/disable flag. Env vars exported globally but directory created only in metaswarm mode. Silent error handling. No validation.
gaps: STAMPEDE_COLLAB_* env vars exported in non-metaswarm mode but directories not created
Leaf workers get env vars but no prompt context
Three sources of truth for collab state (state.json, fleet.json, swarm-state.json)

commander_agent.summary: agents/stampede-commander.agent.md contains ZERO collaboration-bus documentation. No mention of collab, proposals, reviews, consensus, broadcasts, or the 6-step workflow. Commander instructions are incomplete.
gaps: No mention of collaboration bus anywhere
Commanders depend on ephemeral launcher prompt injection (stampede.sh:891)

skill_md.summary: skills/SKILL.md has ZERO collaboration-bus logic. Does not generate collab blocks, does not add collab field to task manifests, does not document collab. All collab is runtime-only injection by stampede.sh.
gaps: Task manifest template (lines 208-254) has no collab field
No collaboration instructions in agent prompts
STEP 2 directory creation (lines 143-146) does not create collab/
Fragile: collab depends entirely on bash prompt string (stampede.sh:891)

tests.summary: tests/ directory has NO collaboration-bus coverage. smoke-test.sh validates metaswarm structure but not collab ledgers, workflow, or cross-commander interaction.
missing_tests: Cross-agent proposal → review → improve → consensus → broadcast → adopt flow
Missing collab/ directory or ledger files

documentation.summary: Collaboration bus is NOT documented in any user-facing docs: README, AGENTS, CHANGELOG, docs/story.md, or agent .md files. Feature is undiscoverable except by reading shell script source.
missing_docs: No README section for collaboration bus
No schema documentation for JSONL ledgers

cross_cutting_issues: Collaboration bus exists in code but is completely undocumented
Implementation is runtime-only (bash prompt injection) with no structural representation in task manifests or agent specs
Zero test coverage for the entire feature
Brittle architecture: collab depends on stampede.sh line 891 prompt string and env vars
Commanders have no fallback if bash prompt fails
Workers excluded from collab (no broadcast consumption)
Three duplicate sources of truth (state.json, fleet.json, swarm-state.json)
recommendation: Collaboration bus is production-ready code but lacks documentation, tests, and structural integration. Immediate actions: (1) Add README/AGENTS.md collab section with ledger schemas and workflow. (2) Add integration test with 2+ commanders exchanging proposals/reviews/consensus. (3) Add collab field to SKILL.md task manifest template. (4) Document collab in stampede-commander.agent.md. (5) Consider adding --collab flag for explicit control. (6) Add error handling and validation for malformed ledger entries.
